monitor_the_situation.title: US Launches 9th Night of Strikes Across Iran After 3 Troops Killed

US Strikes Tabriz, Khorramabad in Ninth Night of Iran Bombing Campaign Against IRGC Targets Across 11 Cities, Strait of Hormuz Region, and Missile Fields; Sirens Sound in Kuwait, Bahrain; Vessel Catch
Iran Launches Ballistic Missiles and Drones at Bahrain, Jordan, Kuwait, Iraq
Iranian Ballistic Missiles Kill 2 US Troops, Destroy Aircraft in Jordan

Missile Strikes Hit Jordan's Muwaffaq Salti Air Base, Wounding Troops
